name: ce-secrets
description: Encrypted multi-device secrets vault + auth for ce-net. Generate/rotate/store keys under a name without ever printing the value; share across your devices (laptop + phone tab); grant apps scoped access. CLI + Node SDK + browser SDK + standalone app.
author: Leif Rydenfalk <ledamecrydenfalk@gmail.com>

scripts.app:build: cp src/crypto.mjs src/vault.mjs src/auth.mjs app/ && sed 's#\.\./src/#./#g' client/index.js > app/client.js
scripts.app:deploy: npm run app:build && node ../web/ce-app/bin/ce-app.mjs deploy --project vault
